name: Truly Lamb Mini Stick For Dog Training 90g
shortDescription: Make training time tastier with Truly Lamb Mini Sticks ! These bite-sized, high-protein treats are made with real lamb and are perfect for rewarding your dog during training sessions. With a delicious flavor your dog will love, they’re great for motivating and keeping your pup focused. Plus, they’re small enough for multiple rewards in one session!
